title: Gas smell during hot work — check shaft seals before cutting
summary: Closed incident: radio-reported gas smell on B-04 during hot work traced to oven-4 shaft seal weep. Purge and seal check before restarting hot work.

title: Bearing overheat repeats when vibration ignored
summary: Two closed WOs on EQ-OVEN-4 show BRG-OVERHEAT after elevated vibration windows. Treat rising vibration + open MO as a compound signal.

title: Adjacent seal work pauses hot work
summary: SIMOPS: P-3 seal repair on B-03 conflicted with B-04 hot work. Always review adjacent permits.
